name: Plex
description: Media server that organizes and streams your movies, TV, and music to any device.

name: Jellyfin
description: Free, open-source media server with no subscriptions or tracking. Stream anywhere.

name: Emby
description: Personal media server with a Netflix-like interface, live TV support, and multi-device streaming.

name: Tautulli
description: Monitoring and analytics tool for Plex. Tracks playback history, stats, and sends notifications.

name: Jellyseerr
description: Request management for Jellyfin and Plex. Users request media through a polished interface.

name: Bazarr
description: Automatically downloads and manages subtitles for your movies and TV shows.

name: Kavita
description: Self-hosted digital library for manga, comics, and books with a clean reading interface.

name: Audiobookshelf
description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server with cross-device progress tracking and podcast feeds.

name: Traefik
description: Cloud-native reverse proxy that auto-discovers Docker services and provisions SSL certificates automatically.

name: Nginx Proxy Manager
description: GUI for managing Nginx reverse proxies and Let's Encrypt SSL certs without editing config files.

name: Caddy
description: Web server and reverse proxy with automatic HTTPS via Let's Encrypt built in by default.

name: Pi-hole
description: Network-level DNS ad blocker that removes ads on every device without client-side software.

name: AdGuard Home
description: Network-wide DNS ad blocker with parental controls, per-device stats, and encrypted DNS support.

name: wg-easy
description: WireGuard VPN server with a built-in web UI for managing clients and QR code setup.

name: Tailscale
description: Zero-config mesh VPN built on WireGuard. Connects devices securely without port forwarding.

name: Cloudflared
description: Cloudflare Tunnel daemon that exposes local services to the internet without opening firewall ports.

name: Grafana
description: Open-source analytics platform for building dashboards from metrics, logs, and dozens of data sources.

name: Prometheus
description: Time-series metrics database that scrapes targets on a pull model. The backbone of homelab monitoring.

name: Uptime Kuma
description: Self-hosted uptime monitor with a real-time dashboard, multi-protocol checks, and rich notifications.

name: Netdata
description: Real-time monitoring agent that collects thousands of system and container metrics with zero config.

name: Loki
description: Grafana's log aggregation system. Stores and queries logs efficiently using labels, not full-text indexing.

name: Dozzle
description: Lightweight real-time Docker log viewer accessible from the browser. No storage required.

name: Glances
description: Cross-platform system monitor with a web UI showing CPU, memory, disk, network, and containers.

name: Speedtest Tracker
description: Runs scheduled internet speed tests and tracks upload, download, and ping trends over time.

name: Changedetection.io
description: Monitors websites for content changes and alerts you via email, Telegram, Discord, or webhook.

name: Home Assistant
description: The leading open-source home automation platform. Local control, no cloud dependency or subscriptions.

name: Node-RED
description: Visual flow-based programming tool for wiring together APIs, hardware, and home automation logic.

name: Mosquitto
description: Lightweight MQTT broker. The real-time messaging backbone for IoT and home automation setups.

name: Zigbee2MQTT
description: Bridges Zigbee devices to MQTT without proprietary hubs. Supports hundreds of devices locally.

name: Dashy
description: Highly customizable homelab dashboard with widgets, service status checks, and YAML configuration.

name: Homer
description: Dead-simple static homepage for self-hosted services, configured from a single YAML file.

name: Homarr
description: Modern homelab dashboard with drag-and-drop widgets, service integrations, and live status indicators.

name: Flame
description: Minimal self-hosted start page with app shortcuts and Docker label auto-discovery.

name: Watchtower
description: Automatically updates running Docker containers when new image versions are published.

name: Vaultwarden
description: Lightweight Bitwarden-compatible password manager server written in Rust. Works with all Bitwarden clients.

name: Authelia
description: Open-source SSO and two-factor authentication gateway for securing your self-hosted services.

name: Authentik
description: Flexible identity provider with SSO, MFA, and support for SAML, OAuth2, OIDC, and LDAP.

name: Keycloak
description: Enterprise identity and access management with SSO, OAuth2, OIDC, and LDAP federation.

name: Nextcloud
description: Self-hosted Google Drive alternative with file sync, calendars, contacts, and collaborative office tools.

name: Immich
description: High-performance self-hosted photo backup with facial recognition and automatic album creation.

name: Filebrowser
description: Web-based file manager for browsing, uploading, downloading, and sharing files from your server.

name: Syncthing
description: Peer-to-peer file sync between devices with no central server or cloud service required.

name: Duplicati
description: Encrypted, incremental backup client supporting cloud storage, FTP, and local destinations.

name: Gitea
description: Lightweight self-hosted Git service with repos, issues, pull requests, and Actions CI/CD.

name: Forgejo
description: Community-governed Gitea fork focused on software freedom and open development. Fully API-compatible.

name: Drone CI
description: Self-hosted CI/CD platform where pipelines run in isolated Docker containers, defined as YAML.

name: Paperless-ngx
description: Document management system that OCRs scanned papers into a searchable, auto-tagged digital archive.

name: Stirling PDF
description: Local web app for PDF operations: merge, split, compress, convert, and redact without third-party services.

name: Mealie
description: Self-hosted recipe manager and meal planner. Import recipes from any URL and generate shopping lists.
